title: Quantum Computing Inc. and Ciena Demonstrate Next-Generation Quantum-Secured Communications with High-Speed Encryption using PQC and QKD at OFC 2026
why:
- Quantum Computing Inc. and Ciena demonstrated next-generation quantum-secured communications featuring high-speed encryption.
- The demonstration utilized both post-quantum cryptography (PQC) and quantum key distribution (QKD).
- This achievement was presented at OFC 2026, a significant event in optical networking and communication.
- The combination of PQC and QKD in the demonstration highlights advances in securing data against threats posed by quantum computers.
